Text.FeedbackText: 已开始升级
CheckRepair lost+found objects
CheckRepair missing bidirectional links
CheckRepair clear segment flags
C0010:1015 Repair 'Comment' for DeviceDataObject 'S71500/ET200MP station_1'. Comment object had no culture infos.
C0010:1015 Repair 'Comment' for DeviceDataObject 'DESKTOP-KHFML3Q'. Comment object had no culture infos.
用户已使用所需的工程组态权限“升级项目”登录。
Starting removal of system role assignments compatibility from system device function rights
系统定义的角色和功能权限的分配移除操作已完成。
正在移除旧的系统角色。
移除旧的系统角色操作已完成。
将删除不在支持的工程组态权限。
不再支持的工程组态权限已删除。
将删除系统定义的运行系统权限。
删除系统运行系统权限已完成。
开始更改 DFR 与 DFRSet 间的链接
Finished change link between DFR and DFRSet
Starting data conversion workflow for umac entities i.e. System Role, EFR & DFR
Starting data conversion workflow for Data DfrSet
Finished data conversion workflow for Data DfrSet
Finished data conversion workflow for umac entities i.e. System Role, EFR & DFR
密码哈希的数据转换工作流已启动
密码哈希的数据转换工作流程已完成

Details.Text: HmiConvert is waiting for external dependency: Siemens.Simatic.Lang.SPLConvert
